error_signature: cannot select or locate Google sheet
title: Unable to select Google Sheet in Google Sheets node
symptom: The user cannot select or locate their Google Sheet when trying to add rows in the Google Sheets node.
applies_when: Trying to add rows to a sheet
not_this_if: Using the correct document ID or URL
root_cause: The Google Sheets node requires the document ID or URL to locate the sheet, but users often mistakenly provide the document name instead, which leads to the inability to find the sheet.
fix_steps: Obtain the correct document ID from the Google Sheets URL
Use the document ID in the Google Sheets node configuration
Save the workflow and try again
agent_instruction: Ensure you are using the correct document ID or URL in the Google Sheets node.
